Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]have improved thanks to the[n]skillful expression in the writing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun. Did you finish reading the final volume?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You looked really focused when you were reading. I can definitely relate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}When I got to the end, I was so absorbed that I almost forgot to breathe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I didn't notice at first, but at some point I could suddenly just make sense of the complex setting. Isn't it weird how that works?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Oh, it really does feel that way, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}They do say advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic. Maybe going in with that mindset makes sci-fi a little less intimidating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Right. If it was just straight exposition, it would be exhausting trying to keep track of everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Being able to tie the world-building into the narrative really shows how skilled the author is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Ah, I actually do that a lot too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Sometimes you don't understand it on your first read, but as you continue on, it all starts to come together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...I wish I could communicate as well as the author does in this book.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Remember when I told you how I recommended a book to a classmate, but she turned me down?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Knowing what to say is important, but how you say it is difficult too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Before I could tell her how fascinating the story is... I was telling her how many volumes it was and that it's written by a famous author...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I don't think that kind of information's going to persuade someone to read.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...Thanks. Maybe I'll try talking to her again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I think I'll have a lot of good things to say about this book now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Right. It's so easy to fall back on information like that, like the number of copies sold, or the writer's prestige.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But if I want to explain how good a story is, I need to start with the emotions it evokes when you read it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It always feels nice when someone shows an interest in something you like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Even just sharing our opinions like this is so refreshing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That's why I really want to work on how I communicate things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Because if I do that, then maybe I'll get more fun moments like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka is nodding with determination.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Oh, look at the time... We should probably call it a night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I have some other books I can recommend, if you'd like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}Thank you, {f 4 1}-kun. I hope you'll like those too.[n]{f 1 1}
